title: Fefze beetle

The '''fefze beetle''' were originally a swarm of [[fefze]] who were contracted to work on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Fefze were large, beetle-like insects that shared a single group mind; however, due to Duro's pollution, the swarm began to mutate, losing their sentience and becoming aggressive predators. Due to the fact that all native life on the planet was killed off from the pollution, fefze beetles became the only fauna on Duro.<ref name="BP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref> Fefze were also able to spit digestive acids at short range.<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

[[Nuri]] the [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]], shapeshifted into a fefze beetle in order to get away and reveal [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] presence to [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]]. Fett, however, managed to paralyze him with [[xabar]] fungus.<ref name="BF ANT">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>

A number of the beetles lived in the mountains of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. [[Trioculus]] hunted them during his time there, using it to release his anger.

Some fefze beetles devoured a batch of [[naotebe wingling]]s delivered by [[Nom Anor]], helping clear the infested [[Settlement 32]].<ref name="BP" />
